headline: AI for Restaurant Technology: Order Automation, Kitchen Optimization, and Personalized Dining
description: AI is taking your order, cooking your food, and personalizing your meal -- from voice AI at drive-thrus to computer vision in kitchens. McDonald's, White Castle, and Sweetgreen deploy AI across ordering, preparation, and personalization, transforming the restaurant experience.

citation.name: AI in Restaurant Technology: Voice Ordering, Kitchen Automation, and Personalization (2024-2025 Survey)
Conversational AI for Quick-Service Restaurants: Drive-Thru Automation and Multi-Language Order Processing
